title: spectrograph~

flags.name: -db <f>
flags.description:
non-0 sets to dB amp scale
default: linear

flags.name: -log <f>
flags.description:
non-0 sets to log frequency scale
default: linear

flags.name: -rate <float>
flags.description:
sets graph rate in ms
default: 100

methods.description: non-0 sets to dB amp scale
non-0 sets to log frequency scale

body: [spectrograph~] is an abstraction for visualizing FFT amplitudes from 0Hz to Nyquist. It uses a Hann table for the analysis.
